div.p: This case-sensitive code system https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEventTypeCS defines the following codes:

tr.td: The 3-month participant lock-in period is ending soon, allowing the patient to switch to a different participant if desired.
The 12-month control group assignment period is ending soon, allowing the patient to be aligned to a participant.
The alignment period is ending and renewal action is required to continue services under the ACCESS Model.
Baseline data must be reported within 60 days of alignment. The baseline data is due soon. Please submit the baseline data for the patient.
The quarterly data report is due soon. Please submit the quarterly data for the patient.
The end-of-year data report is due soon. Please submit the end-of-year data for the patient.
The patient has been unaligned from the ACCESS Model. See the Beneficiary Alignment Report for additional information.

description.value: This codesystem defines codes for the types of events that trigger subscription notifications in the ACCESS Model.

copyright.value: Copyright (c) 2026 Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS).

definition.value: The 3-month participant lock-in period is ending soon, allowing the patient to switch to a different participant if desired.
The 12-month control group assignment period is ending soon, allowing the patient to be aligned to a participant.
The alignment period is ending and renewal action is required to continue services under the ACCESS Model.
Baseline data must be reported within 60 days of alignment. The baseline data is due soon. Please submit the baseline data for the patient.
The quarterly data report is due soon. Please submit the quarterly data for the patient.
The end-of-year data report is due soon. Please submit the end-of-year data for the patient.
The patient has been unaligned from the ACCESS Model. See the Beneficiary Alignment Report for additional information.
